case_title: WADE NOFLIN VS. CRAIG'S LIST INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAIG'S LIST INC
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF - DEFENDANT NOT SERVED. MORE TIME NEEDED. (FILED USING INCORRECT FORM - SC-150) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOFLIN, WADE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WADE NOFLIN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CRAIG'S LIST INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WILLIAM C. POWELL, DIRECTOR, LAW ENFORCEMENT GOVERNMENT RELATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
